name: Men's Rubberized Plastic Shield Sunglasses with Mirrored Lenses - All In Motion™ Black: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Black rubberized shield sunglasses are designed for active days spent outdoors. Made from recycled plastic with a wide facial fit. Multicolor mirrored lenses are made with UV protection to block harsh sun rays and are scratch resistant to promote lasting use.

All in Motion™: Inspiring the potential in every body.
